sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Navient declares first quarter common stock dividend
feed.summary: Navient has announced that its board of directors approved a 2026 first-quarter common stock dividend of $0.16 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on March 6, 2026. The company helps students and families with higher education costs and focuses on responsible lending and portfolio management.

feed.title: Luxury EV Maker Lucid Cuts 12% Of Workforce In Profitability Push
feed.summary: Luxury EV maker Lucid Group (NASDAQ: LCID) is laying off 12% of its global workforce to streamline operations and enhance profitability after a challenging year. This reduction, affecting hundreds of employees but excluding hourly workers at its Arizona facility, aims to improve efficiency and boost gross margins. The move follows production issues, supply-chain pressures, and executive turnover in 2025, as Lucid prepares to launch a more affordable mid-size EV platform and continues ramping up production of its Gravity SUV.

feed.title: Top CSX Executive Makes Major Multi-Million Dollar Stock Move
feed.summary: CSX EVP & CAO Diana B. Sorfleet sold 90,000 shares of CSX stock for $3,740,400 on February 20, 2026. This significant insider transaction follows a mixed Q4 earnings report for CSX, which saw reduced profits despite improvements in other areas. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CSX as Neutral, citing strong cash flow offset by declining revenue/margins and high leverage.

feed.title: Hydrofarm Holdings ends revolving credit agreement and reports event of default
feed.summary: Hydrofarm Holdings has terminated its revolving credit agreement and reported an event of default after deferring an interest payment on its senior secured term loan. The company is exploring strategic alternatives to improve its liquidity and capital structure, facing a significant debt burden and declining revenue. Despite a "WEAK" financial health score from InvestingPro, the stock appears undervalued, trading near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Patrick Orr Sells 44,615 Shares of Healthcare Serv
feed.summary: Patrick Orr, Executive Vice President & Chief Revenue Officer of Healthcare Services Group Inc (HCSG), sold 44,615 shares of the company on February 18, 2026, leaving him with 0 shares. Over the past year, Orr has sold a total of 90,115 shares, with no insider buys recorded for HCSG during this period. The stock is currently priced at $20.53, and GuruFocus assesses it as significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.5.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Richard Beckwitt Acquires Shares in Weyerhaeuser Co (WY)
feed.summary: Richard Beckwitt, a Director at Weyerhaeuser Co (WY), recently purchased 20,000 shares of the company, increasing his total holdings to 24,065.5896 shares. This transaction follows a pattern of insider buying at Weyerhaeuser Co, despite the stock trading with a price-earnings ratio higher than both the industry median and its historical median. The stock is currently estimated to be fairly valued according to GuruFocus's GF Value.

feed.title: Insider Buying: James O'Rourke Acquires Shares in Weyerhaeuser C
feed.summary: James O'Rourke, a Director at Weyerhaeuser Co (WY), recently purchased 4,000 shares, increasing his total holdings to 28,661 shares. This transaction is part of a broader buying trend among insiders at the company, which has seen four insider buys and two insider sells over the past year. Weyerhaeuser Co's stock is currently trading at $25.35, with a price-earnings ratio higher than both the industry median and its historical median, though its GF Value suggests it is fairly valued.

feed.title: TD Cowen Raises Price Target for Guardant Health (GH) to $135
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Dan Brennan has increased the price target for Guardant Health (GH) from $130 to $135, maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This update reflects continued confidence in the company, a leader in liquid-based cancer tests. Other analysts have also recently raised their price targets for GH.

feed.title: RCI Hospitality Holdings Disclosed Failure to Satisfy a Continued Listing Rule or Standard
feed.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings (RICK) received a notice from Nasdaq on February 18, 2026, indicating non-compliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) for failing to file its FY2025 Form 10-K and Q1 FY2026 Form 10-Q. The company has until March 31, 2026, to submit a compliance plan, with a possible extension until June 29, 2026. This notification does not immediately impact its Nasdaq listing.

feed.title: ExxonMobil's Steady Dividend Growth and Investment Potential
feed.summary: ExxonMobil (XOM) has demonstrated consistent dividend growth for 43 years, currently offering a 2.7% yield, supported by its efficient, integrated business model and strong project execution capabilities. The company is set to enhance its competitive advantage through technological advancements like cube development in the Permian Basin and aims for 65% of its upstream production to come from advantaged assets by 2030, alongside significant cost savings. Despite some analyst ratings suggesting a potential stock price fall, the article highlights the company's robust operational strategies and dividend reliability as key attractions for investors.

feed.title: Magnetar Financial LLC Acquires 1,500,000 Shares in Iron Horse A
feed.summary: Magnetar Financial LLC has acquired 1,500,000 shares in Iron Horse Acquisitions II Corp (IRHO), representing a 5.11% stake in the blank check company. This new holding diversifies Magnetar's portfolio, despite Iron Horse's low GF-Score and mixed financial metrics. The investment highlights Magnetar's strategic interest in potential growth opportunities within the blank check sector, though Iron Horse's profitability and growth potential are currently limited.

feed.title: Exelixis: The Cash‑Generating Biotech That I Think Deserves a Closer Look in 2026
feed.summary: Exelixis, a biotech company, has shown strong financial performance over the past five years, largely due to its successful cancer drug, Cabometyx. While Cabometyx faces potential generic competition by early 2030, Exelixis is developing a new cancer medicine, zanzalintinib, and has other pipeline candidates to mitigate this risk. The company's strategic development and strong market position make it a compelling investment consideration.

feed.title: Reese’s Recipe Debate Heats Up After Hershey Confirms Ingredient Swap
feed.summary: The grandson of Reese's Peanut Butter Cups founder, Brad Reese, has accused The Hershey Co. of "ruining" Reese's by switching to cheaper ingredients like compound coatings and peanut créme. While Hershey confirmed recipe changes, citing innovation and rising cocoa prices, Reese argues it compromises the brand's quality and trust. He expressed his disappointment in a letter to Hershey's corporate brand manager, emphasizing his 25-year dedication to protecting the Reese's brand integrity.

feed.title: Cenovus Plans Major Turnaround at Lima, Ohio, Refinery in Second Half -- OPIS
feed.summary: Cenovus Energy is planning a major turnaround at its 185,000 b/d Lima, Ohio, refinery during the second half of the year, which is expected to reduce annualized throughput by 20,000 b/d to 24,000 b/d. The company's overall maintenance schedule will impact U.S. refining throughputs by 35,000-45,000 b/d in Q3 and 40,000-50,000 b/d in Q4. This follows the successful completion of a 59-day turnaround at its Toledo refinery ahead of schedule in Q1.

feed.title: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP Increases Stake in Immatics NV
feed.summary: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP has increased its stake in Immatics NV, a biotechnology company specializing in cancer immunotherapies, by acquiring an additional 2,617,737 shares. This transaction, valued at $10.50 per share, boosts RTW's total holding in Immatics NV to 11,433,354 shares, representing 8.50% of its portfolio. Despite Immatics NV being considered significantly overvalued with a low GF Score, the move underscores RTW's continued confidence and strategic focus on the biotechnology sector.

feed.title: The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Director Sells $17,514.66 in Stock
feed.summary: The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Director Pison Marivic Uychiat sold 83 shares of the company's stock for $17,514.66 on February 19th and an additional 67 shares on February 20th, reducing her stake by 0.57%. This occurred shortly after the company announced strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and raised its quarterly dividend. The stock currently has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $204.60.

feed.title: W.R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) Major Shareholder Buys $24,374,250.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Major shareholder Sumitomo Insurance Co Mitsui recently purchased 345,000 shares of W.R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) for over $24 million, increasing its stake by 0.60% to total 57,508,038 shares. The transaction, disclosed on February 19th, pushed the company's shares up by 1.1% to $71.08. W.R. Berkley reported Q4 EPS of $1.13 and revenue of $3.18 billion, while analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $69.67.

feed.title: AeroVironment (NASDAQ:AVAV) Director Sells $68,750.00 in Stock
feed.summary: AeroVironment Director Stephen Page sold 250 shares of the company's stock for $68,750, reducing his total holdings by 0.50% to 50,251 shares valued at approximately $13.82 million. Following this transaction, AeroVironment's stock traded down 6.0% to $264.63 with a market capitalization of $13.21 billion. The company recently missed quarterly EPS estimates but exceeded revenue expectations, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $367.

feed.title: The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Director Pison Marivic Uychiat Sells 67 Shares
feed.summary: The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Director Pison Marivic Uychiat sold 67 shares of the company's stock on February 20th for a total of $13,729.64, reducing her stake to 14,340 shares. This follows a previous sale of 83 shares on February 19th. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and announced a dividend increase.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Corcept Class Action Lawsuit – RGRD Law
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated (NASDAQ: CORT) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between October 31, 2024, and December 30, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Corcept misrepresented the likelihood of FDA approval for its lead product candidate, relacorilant, concealing repeated FDA concerns about the adequacy of clinical evidence. After the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter detailing these concerns, Corcept's stock price dropped by more than 50%.

feed.title: Energy Income Partners, LLC Reduces Stake in Westlake Chemical P
feed.summary: Energy Income Partners, LLC has reduced its stake in Westlake Chemical Partners LP by 11.94%, selling 212,108 shares at $19 each. Despite the reduction, the stock has since gained 11.63%. This move is part of the firm's strategy to optimize its energy sector portfolio, focusing on MLPs and YieldCos for its high net worth clients.

feed.title: Hillhouse Capital Management, Ltd. Reduces Stake in Webull Corp
feed.summary: Hillhouse Capital Management, Ltd. significantly reduced its stake in Webull Corp by selling over 27 million shares at $7.77 each on December 31, 2025. This move decreases Hillhouse's holdings in the digital investment platform by 81.94%, reflecting a strategic portfolio adjustment. Webull Corp, which went public in April 2025, currently trades at $5.91 and faces challenges with poor future performance potential according to its GF Score and financial metrics.

feed.title: USA Compression Partners LP Announces 2025 K-1 Tax Package Availability
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) has announced that its 2025 K-1 tax packages are now available online at taxpackagesupport.com/usac and are also being mailed to unitholders. Unitholders can also contact Tax Package Support or visit the company's website for assistance. USA Compression is a leading independent provider of natural gas compression services, focusing on midstream applications.

feed.title: Insider Selling: St. Joe (NYSE:JOE) Major Shareholder Sells 1,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Major shareholder Bruce Berkowitz sold 1,000 shares of St. Joe (NYSE:JOE) stock on February 20, 2026, for a total of $71,510. This sale represents a 0.01% decrease in his ownership, with him still holding over 16 million shares valued at approximately $1.15 billion. The transaction is part of a series of sales totaling about 16,000 shares which analysts interpret as liquidity taking rather than a significant change in control, despite insider selling sometimes being seen as a modest negative signal.

feed.title: Insider Selling: St. Joe (NYSE:JOE) Major Shareholder Sells 3,900 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Major St. Joe (NYSE:JOE) shareholder Bruce Berkowitz sold 3,900 shares of the company's stock on February 19th at an average price of $71.01, totaling $276,939. This transaction reduced his position by 0.02%, though he still holds over 16 million shares. St. Joe's stock traded up 0.8% to $71.52, near its 52-week high, and the company maintains a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts.

feed.title: CDT Equity acquires 20% stake in Sarborg for $115 million By Investing.com
feed.summary: CDT Equity Inc. announced it is acquiring a 20% equity stake in Sarborg Limited for $115 million. Sarborg operates an artificial intelligence business specializing in signature intelligence analysis. Despite CDT's current market capitalization of $2.14 million and its stock trading near a 52-week low, the company views this acquisition as a strengthening of its existing collaboration with Sarborg, whose technology is complementary to CDT's biopharmaceutical development focus.

feed.title: Linde (LIN) Gets Price Target Increase from BMO Capital Ahead of 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst John McNulty has raised his price target for Linde plc (LIN) to $507 from $501, maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment comes as Linde enters 2026 with a robust project backlog and sustained pricing power, which are expected to counteract macroeconomic challenges and slower project ramps. Despite an "uneven" economic environment, Linde reported record annual EPS, operating cash flow, and operating margins in Q4 2025, alongside a record $10 billion project backlog.

feed.title: Hood River Capital Management LLC Expands Stake in HCI Group Inc
feed.summary: Hood River Capital Management LLC increased its stake in HCI Group Inc by acquiring an additional 7,173 shares on December 31, 2025, bringing its total holdings to 747,783 shares. This transaction, valued at $191.69 per share, reflects the firm's continued interest in the insurance sector despite a subsequent 18.56% decline in HCI Group Inc's stock price. HCI Group Inc operates in property and casualty insurance, particularly in Florida, and maintains a stable financial position with a GuruFocus financial strength rating of 7/10 and significant earnings growth.

feed.title: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (NYSE:FG) to Issue $0.25 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (NYSE:FG) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share, payable on March 31st to shareholders of record on March 17th. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 3.9%. The company's stock recently fell by 7.9% to $25.50 after reporting an earnings and revenue miss, although analysts have mixed views with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $37.00.

feed.title: CVR Energy Inc. (NYSE:CVI) Declares $0.37 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: CVR Energy Inc. (NYSE:CVI) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share, payable on March 9th to shareholders of record on March 2nd, resulting in an indicated yield of approximately 7.2%. Despite this, the dividend appears unsustainable given the company's 679.7% payout ratio and reliance on its balance sheet for payments, with analysts forecasting a projected payout ratio of roughly 623% for next year. The company recently reported a quarterly EPS of ($0.80) on revenue of $1.81 billion, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Strong Sell" with an average price target of $29.25.

feed.title: Assured Guaranty Ltd. (NYSE:AGO) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.38
feed.summary: Assured Guaranty Ltd. (NYSE:AGO) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share, marking an 11.8% increase from its previous dividend. This dividend will be payable on March 20th to shareholders of record on March 6th, with an ex-dividend date of March 6th. The company maintains a healthy payout ratio of 19.2%, with analysts projecting a future payout ratio of 20.9%, indicating strong coverage of its dividend.

feed.title: Fidelity National Financial, Inc. (NYSE:FNF) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.52
feed.summary: Fidelity National Financial, Inc. (NYSE:FNF) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share, payable on March 31st to shareholders of record on March 17th, equating to a 4.0% yield. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 31.5% and expected future earnings per share of $6.67, supporting an annualized dividend of $2.08. Despite missing EPS estimates in the latest quarter, the company saw an 11.9% increase in revenue, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $68.25.

feed.title: Flowers Foods, Inc. to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.25 (NYSE:FLO)
feed.summary: Flowers Foods (NYSE:FLO) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2475 per share, representing a 9.8% annualized yield and payable on March 20th to shareholders of record on March 6th. While the company has consistently increased its dividend for 24 years, its high payout ratio of 87.6% indicates potential risk if earnings decline. Analysts, however, forecast an EPS of $1.29 for next year, suggesting continued dividend coverage with a future payout ratio of 76.7%.

feed.title: RCI Hospitality receives Nasdaq noncompliance notice on filings
feed.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (RICK) has received a noncompliance notice from Nasdaq due to its failure to timely file its Form 10-Q and Form 10-K with the SEC. The company has until March 31, 2026, to file the reports or submit a compliance plan, with a potential extension to June 29, 2026. This notice comes amidst a period of leadership transitions and a slight decrease in sales for the fiscal first quarter of 2026, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued.

feed.title: SEC Charges ADM and Three Former Executives with Accounting and Disclosure Fraud
feed.summary: The SEC has charged Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) and three former executives with accounting and disclosure fraud, alleging they inflated earnings and manipulated financial statements. This action highlights concerns about corporate governance and the importance of ethical practices, leading to a decline in ADM's stock price and heightening regulatory scrutiny within the industry. The case serves as a powerful reminder for companies to maintain rigorous ethical standards and transparency to prevent financial misconduct and restore investor trust.

feed.title: Sibanye Stillwater Stock Sinks Again: Bargain Gold Play or Value Trap for US Investors?
feed.summary: Sibanye Stillwater's stock has heavily underperformed despite strong gold prices, primarily due to struggles in the platinum group metals (PGM) market, rising costs, and labor risks. While it trades at a significant discount to its net asset value, US investors face high risk, betting on PGM recovery, successful restructuring, and stable South African operations. The company's dividend is also less reliable, making it a speculative play for those comfortable with high volatility and emerging market risks.

feed.title: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP Acquires Additional Shares in Tenax Therapeu
feed.summary: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP increased its stake in Tenax Therapeutics Inc. by acquiring an additional 272,622 shares on December 31, 2025, bringing its total holdings to 650,968 shares. This strategic move, valued at $12.19 per share, reflects RTW's confidence in the specialty pharmaceutical company despite its current financial challenges. Tenax Therapeutics Inc. focuses on cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases and is advancing clinical trials for levosimendan, aligning with RTW INVESTMENTS, LP's healthcare-focused investment strategy.

feed.title: Blackstone's (BX) Perpetual Private Equity Strategy Fund To Acquire Champions Group
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. (BX) announced that its perpetual private equity strategy fund has entered into an agreement to acquire Champions Group, a prominent home services company. This acquisition, expected to close in the first half of 2026, aligns with Blackstone's strategy to expand into a multi-service powerhouse and build platforms in fragmented industries like home services. Champions Group offers essential residential services with over 1,800 field technicians and 150,000 active members.

feed.title: CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CRSP) General Counsel Sells $111,048.96 in Stock
feed.summary: CRISPR Therapeutics General Counsel, James Kasinger, sold 2,112 shares of the company's stock for $111,048.96, reducing his stake by 2.42%. This sale followed the company's quarterly earnings report, which showed a significant miss with EPS of ($1.37) against an estimated ($1.15) and revenues down 97.8% year-over-year. Analysts currently have an average target price of $64.24 for CRSP, with a mixed rating of Buy, Hold, and Sell recommendations.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Insider Vicente Reynal Sells 900 Shares
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) insider Vicente Reynal sold 900 shares of the company's stock for $90,000 on February 18th, reducing his direct ownership to 193,186 shares. This latest transaction is part of a series of insider sales by Reynal and other senior executives in February, which MarketBeat identifies as a key factor in recent downward pressure on the stock despite strong Q4 earnings and positive FY2026 guidance. The company also announced a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $101.86.

feed.title: Insider Selling: PennyMac Financial Services (NYSE:PFSI) CEO Sells 10,000 Shares of Stock

This sale reduced his position by 9.94%. The company also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share and current stock performance shows a 1.9% decrease.

feed.title: Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Director Sells 2,367 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: A director at Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON), D Scott Davis, sold 2,367 shares of the company's stock on February 19th, 2026, for a total value of $568,080. Following the transaction, Davis's holdings decreased by 7.08%, leaving him with 31,081 shares worth approximately $7.46 million. The article also provides a financial overview of Honeywell, including recent earnings, dividends, institutional trading, and analyst ratings, with the company currently holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating.

feed.title: CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CRSP) CEO Sells $366,324.86 in Stock
feed.summary: CRISPR Therapeutics CEO Samarth Kulkarni recently sold 6,967 shares for $366,324.86, adding to previous sales in January totaling roughly $5.53 million in CRSP stock, reducing his stake by 2.99%. This comes after the company reported a significant earnings and revenue miss, though institutional ownership is high and analyst ratings average a "Hold" with a $64.24 price target. The company specializes in gene-editing therapies for serious diseases, with its lead program CTX001 for sickle cell disease.

feed.title: DXP Enterprises to Announce Q4 and FY 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: DXP Enterprises plans to release its financial results for Q4 and FY 2025 after market close on February 25, 2025. The company will host a conference call on February 26, 2025, at 10:30 AM Central Time, streamed live on its website for investors. The announcement reminds investors that forward-looking statements involve risks and uncertainties.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Price Target, Sees "Some Encouragement" in Outlook
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Julian Mitchell has raised his price target for Illinois Tool Works (ITW) to $275 from $244, while maintaining an Underweight rating. The adjustment follows the company's better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings, driven by strong demand for automotive parts and strategies to mitigate tariff impacts. Despite "some encouragement" in the outlook, the analyst retains a cautious stance.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Alan Higginson Sells 1,770 Shares of F5 Inc (FFIV)

The stock was trading at $275.25, suggesting it is modestly overvalued according to its GuruFocus Value of $227.40.

feed.title: CVE Cenovus Energy Inc. Feb 20 2026 TD Maintained Buy, BMO Maintained Outperform
feed.summary: TD Securities and BMO Capital have both maintained their positive ratings for Cenovus Energy Inc. (CVE) as of February 20, 2026, while concurrently raising their price targets to C$35. TD affirmed its "Buy" rating and BMO its "Outperform" rating, indicating continued analyst confidence in the company's prospects. This decision, reflecting improved cash flow or commodity upside expectations, led to modest intraday share price increases for CVE.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) Trading Down 8% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) shares fell 8% on Friday, trading at $9.5250 with decreased volume. Despite analyst ratings of "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $16.57, insiders have been net sellers, liquidating over 2.3 million shares worth $25.5 million in the last 90 days. feed.title: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) Stock Price Down 7.5% - What's Next?
feed.summary: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) experienced a 7.5% decline in its stock price on Friday, trading at $3.875 with a volume of approximately 39.15 million shares. The stock is currently below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages, and analyst ratings are mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a consensus target price of $6.00. The company's fundamentals show strong liquidity but a negative trailing P/E.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Trading Down 1.3% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) shares experienced a 1.3% decline on Friday, trading down to $658.1020 on lower-than-average volume. This occurred despite several analysts raising their price targets, though the company still holds a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target of $612.50. The aerospace company recently reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS estimates but surpassing revenue expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45 per share.
